Message: ['EC2'] does not contain items matching 'FARGATE'

Rule.Description: When using an ECS service with 'LaunchType' of 'FARGATE' the associated task definition must have 'RequiresCompatibilities' specified with 'FARGATE' listed
Rule.ShortDescription: Validate ECS service using Fargate uses TaskDefinition that allows Fargate

Message: 'NetworkConfiguration' is a required property

Rule.Description: When using an ECS task definition has NetworkMode set to 'awsvpc' then 'NetworkConfiguration' is required
Rule.ShortDescription: Validate ECS service requires NetworkConfiguration

Message: 'DeletionPolicy' is a required property (The default action when replacing/removing a resource is to delete it. Set explicit values for stateful resource)

Rule.Description: The default action when replacing/removing a resource is to delete it. This check requires you to explicitly set policies
Rule.ShortDescription: Check stateful resources have a set UpdateReplacePolicy/DeletionPolicy

Message: 'UpdateReplacePolicy' is a required property (The default action when replacing/removing a resource is to delete it. Set explicit values for stateful resource)

Rule.Description: The default action when replacing/removing a resource is to delete it. This check requires you to explicitly set policies
Rule.ShortDescription: Check stateful resources have a set UpdateReplacePolicy/DeletionPolicy

Message: 'MessageRetentionPeriod' is a required property (The default retention period will delete the data after a pre-defined time. Set an explicit values to avoid data loss on resource)

Rule.Description: The behaviour for data retention is different across AWS Services.If no retention period is specified the default for some services is to delete the data after a period of time.This check requires you to explicitly set the retention period for those resources to avoid unexpected data losses
Rule.ShortDescription: Check resources with auto expiring content have explicit retention period

Message: Source queue type 'FIFO' does not match destination queue type 'standard'

Rule.Description: SQS queues using DLQ have to have the destination queue as the same type (FIFO or standard)
Rule.ShortDescription: Validate SQS DLQ queues are the same type

Message: 'DeletionPolicy' is a required property (The default action when replacing/removing a resource is to delete it. Set explicit values for stateful resource)

Rule.Description: The default action when replacing/removing a resource is to delete it. This check requires you to explicitly set policies
Rule.ShortDescription: Check stateful resources have a set UpdateReplacePolicy/DeletionPolicy

Message: 'UpdateReplacePolicy' is a required property (The default action when replacing/removing a resource is to delete it. Set explicit values for stateful resource)

Rule.ShortDescription: Check stateful resources have a set UpdateReplacePolicy/DeletionPolicy

Message: 'MessageRetentionPeriod' is a required property (The default retention period will delete the data after a pre-defined time. Set an explicit values to avoid data loss on resource)

Rule.Description: The behaviour for data retention is different across AWS Services.If no retention period is specified the default for some services is to delete the data after a period of time.This check requires you to explicitly set the retention period for those resources to avoid unexpected data losses
Rule.ShortDescription: Check resources with auto expiring content have explicit retention period

Message: 'COGNITO_USER_POOLS' is not one of ['TOKEN', 'REQUEST']

Rule.Description: When using AuthorizationType 'CUSTOM', the referenced Authorizer must have Type 'TOKEN' or 'REQUEST'. When using AuthorizationType 'COGNITO_USER_POOLS', the Authorizer must have Type 'COGNITO_USER_POOLS'.
Rule.ShortDescription: API Gateway Method AuthorizationType must match Authorizer Type

Message: ARN in Resource CognitoAuthorizer contains hardcoded Partition in ARN or incorrectly placed Pseudo Parameters

Rule.Description: Checks Resources if ARNs use correctly placed Pseudo Parameters instead of hardcoded Partition, Region, and Account Number
Rule.ShortDescription: ARNs should use correctly placed Pseudo Parameters

Message: {'Ref': 'RestApi2'} was expected

Rule.Description: When an API Gateway Stage references a Deployment, both must reference the same RestApi. A mismatch causes a deployment failure.
Rule.ShortDescription: API Gateway Stage and Deployment must use the same RestApi

Message: ARN in Resource FifoProcessor contains hardcoded Partition in ARN or incorrectly placed Pseudo Parameters

Rule.Description: Checks Resources if ARNs use correctly placed Pseudo Parameters instead of hardcoded Partition, Region, and Account Number
Rule.ShortDescription: ARNs should use correctly placed Pseudo Parameters

Message: 15 is greater than the maximum of 10

Rule.Description: When an EventSourceMapping references a FIFO SQS queue, the BatchSize must be at most 10
Rule.ShortDescription: Validate SQS FIFO queue EventSourceMapping BatchSize is at most 10

Message: Password shouldn't be hardcoded for Resources/AuroraCluster/Properties/MasterUserPassword

Rule.Description: Password properties should not be strings and if parameter using NoEcho
Rule.ShortDescription: Check if Password Properties are correctly configured

Message: 'aurora-mysql' was expected

Rule.Description: When a DBInstance references a DBCluster via DBClusterIdentifier, the Engine property must match between the two resources
Rule.ShortDescription: Validate RDS DBInstance Engine matches DBCluster Engine
